allow: PowerShell(npx eslint src/components/JiwoMascot.tsx src/components/JiwoPeek.tsx src/pages/Visualization.tsx src/pages/SleepCompanion.tsx)

PowerShell(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force "animated-sites\\jiwo\\assets" | Out-Null; foreach \($n in @\('happy','calm','sad','sleep'\)\) { Copy-Item "public\\jiwo\\idle1.png" "animated-sites\\jiwo\\assets\\$n.png" }; Get-ChildItem "animated-sites\\jiwo\\assets" | Select-Object Name, Length)

PowerShell(foreach \($n in @\('happy','calm','sad','sleep'\)\) { Copy-Item "public\\jiwo\\$n.png" "animated-sites\\jiwo\\assets\\$n.png" -Force }; Get-ChildItem "animated-sites\\jiwo\\assets" | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}})

PowerShell($r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/welcome/index.html" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "status=$\($r.StatusCode\) length=$\($r.RawContentLength\)"; Write-Output \($r.Content.Substring\(0, 200\)\); $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/welcome/assets/happy.png?v=2" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10 -Method Head; Write-Output "happy.png status=$\($r2.StatusCode\) type=$\($r2.Headers['Content-Type']\)")

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "https://ahnchamqeyiqhfeezlxq.supabase.co/functions/v1/chat" -Method POST -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15 -ContentType "application/json" -Body '{}' } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; Write-Output "status=$\([int]$resp.StatusCode\)"; $sr = New-Object IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); Write-Output $sr.ReadToEnd\(\) })
PowerShell(npx -y supabase functions deploy chat --project-ref ahnchamqeyiqhfeezlxq --use-api)

PowerShell(if \($env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY\) { Write-Output \("env key present, prefix: " + $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(10, $env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.Length\)\) + "..."\) } else { Write-Output 'ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not in environment' })

PowerShell($pkg = Get-Content "node_modules\\pdf-parse\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Output "version: $\($pkg.version\)"; Write-Output "main: $\($pkg.main\)"; Write-Output "--- exports ---"; $pkg.exports | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 4; Write-Output "--- files in package ---"; Get-ChildItem "node_modules\\pdf-parse" -File | Select-Object Name; Get-ChildItem "node_modules\\pdf-parse\\dist" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name)

PowerShell(npm install pdf-parse@1.1.1 --save-dev 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 3; Write-Output "---"; \(Get-Content "node_modules\\pdf-parse\\package.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).version; Test-Path "node_modules\\pdf-parse\\lib\\pdf-parse.js")
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "public\\jiwo" | Select-Object Name, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object Name)

PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/jiwo/sleep.png" -Method HEAD -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "sleep.png HTTP: $\($r.StatusCode\) type=$\($r.Headers['Content-Type']\) len=$\($r.Headers['Content-Length']\)" } catch { Write-Output "sleep.png GAGAL: $\([int]$_.Exception.Response.StatusCode\)" })
